claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Fixed installer Codex UserPromptSubmit registration so DinoBrain is merged into the first existing prompt-hook group instead of being appended as a separate second group. Only install.ps1 and scripts/verify-installer-hooks.ps1 were changed. Added regression cases preserving why-was-fable-banned and verifying DinoBrain appears exactly once in the first UserPromptSubmit group. Created branch fix/codex-userprompt-hook-merge, committed, pushed, and opened PR #1.
